steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ is written in slope-intercept form:
$$
y=\frac{3}{4}x+2
$$
In $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m$, so line $k$ has slope $\frac{3}{4}$.

steps.title: Use parallel slopes
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope, so line $j$ has slope $$ \frac{3}{4}=0.75 $$ The answer is .75.
